description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a deep purple cover and gold embossed text. The front cover displays the author's name and the title 'Das Kapital' in a classic serif font, with a subtle horizontal line separating the title from the author's name. The spine is also purple and features vertically oriented gold text, matching the front cover's style. The book's pages are visible from the top and bottom, showing a dense, tightly bound block of off-white paper. The back cover is plain purple with no visible markings or illustrations. The overall appearance is formal and scholarly, suggesting a significant literary or academic work.
description: A thick, hardbound book with a deep purple cover and gold embossed text, featuring a plain back and visible dense pages.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing vertical gold text on a purple background.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, displaying gold embossed text and a plain purple surface.
description_view_2: The top edge of the book is visible, revealing tightly packed off-white pages and the purple cover wrapping around.
description_view_3: The back cover is shown, which is entirely plain and purple with no text or illustrations.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is deep purple with vertically oriented gold text in a serif font. There are no additional decorative elements or patterns.
